profile_avatar_dialogDescription: Upload an image to use as your avatar. Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF. Max 5 MB.
profile_avatar_dropzone: Click to browse or drag and drop an image
profile_avatar_fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 5 MB.
profile_avatar_unsupportedFormat: Unsupported format. Use JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF.
profile_avatar_cropDescription: Drag to reposition. Scroll or pinch to zoom.
